projects.title: BugSleuth
projects.bodyText:
- Unsupervised Bug localization technique
 -  Real time debuggin with millisecond runtime.
 - Localizes 56% of bugs in 704 real word Java projects in top-5 ranked statements.
 - Submitted to International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE'25)

projects.title: Viva Mind -  Mental Health and Wellness Tracker
projects.bodyText:
- Mental Health tracking platform built on MERN stack.
- 5k+ active users.
- AI-driven sentiment analysis on user journal entries.
- Personalized recommendations and mood based content.
- Scalable MongoDB data model supporting 1million+ data points.
- B2B therapist integrations

projects.title: Automated Wetland Delineation
projects.bodyText:
- An automated system for mapping wetlands.
 - Uses hyperspectral LISS-III image data.
 - Atrous convolutional neural network for segmentation of wetlands.
 - Highlights commission and omission errors in manual wetland delineation.
 - Used as a quality control tool at ISRO reducing manual effort by 80%.

projects.title: College Recommendation App
projects.bodyText:
- Mobile Application built using Flutter for college recommendation.
 - A python based web scraper scrapes relevant college details based on user profile .
 - A recommendation algoritm recommends colleges to users with 97.89% accuracy.

projects.title: FLARE: Forecasting Lake and Reservior Ecosystems
projects.bodyText:
- Transformed FLARE into a serverless, multi-cloud architecture using FaaS.
 - Enabled scalable, real-time forecasting automation on AWS Lambda, Github Actions and OpenWhisk.
 - Automated data assimilation and forecast processing, enhancing cloud orchestration across multiple monitoring sites.
